title: Micron Technology Inc (MU) Q4 2024 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: Micron Technology was scheduled to release Q4 2024 earnings on September 25, 2024. Analysts anticipated quarterly revenue of approximately $7.6 billion with earnings per share of $0.80. Full-Year 2024 Expectations: Revenue: $25.04 billion, EPS: $0.75. In the previous quarter (May 2024), Micron beat analysts' revenue expectations of $6.67 billion by 2.12%, delivering $6.81 billion in actual revenue and $0.30 EPS, surpassing earnings forecasts by 4.17%. The average 12-month price target from 30 analysts stands at $156.01, suggesting 66.73% upside potential from the $93.57 stock price. The company maintains an Outperform consensus rating across 38 brokerage firms. However, GuruFocus flagged 2 warning signs associated with the stock.
